task_completion.description: Create a segmentation mask for intracranial and sinus air spaces
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius 'Masks' panel on the left, a mask should be created and active. The threshold range for this mask should show a maximum value of -200 HU.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D surface mesh from the air spaces mask
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model of the air spaces should be visible in the 3D view panel (usually bottom right). The '3D surfaces' panel on the left should list the newly generated surface.

task_completion.description: Export the air space surface as an STL file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export 3D surface' or 'Save As' dialog box should be visible, showing the file being saved as 'air_spaces.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/' directory, or a file manager showing the created file.

task_completion.description: Create a second segmentation mask for brain soft tissue
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Masks' panel, a second mask should be visible. The threshold range for this mask should show a minimum of -200 HU and a maximum of at least 50 HU.

task_completion.description: Place at least 4 linear measurements in the slice views
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D slice views (Axial, Coronal, or Sagittal), there should be at least 4 measurement lines drawn across dark regions (air pockets/sinuses), with numerical values displayed. Each measurement must be >= 5.0 mm.

A 'Save Project As' dialog box should be visible, showing the project being saved as 'pneumocephalus_study.inv3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/' directory, or a file manager showing the saved file.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the InVesalius interface, using the threshold sliders, measurement tools, and 3D surface generation buttons.

integrity.description: Measurements were genuinely drawn using the software's measurement tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines and text should match the native UI style of InVesalius's measurement tool overlaid on the CT slices, not added via an external image editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python scripts or command-line tools being used to directly generate the .inv3 or .stl files without using the InVesalius application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Air segmentation mask requires a maximum HU threshold of -200. Soft tissue mask requires a minimum HU of -200 and a maximum HU of >= 50. At least 4 linear measurements must be present in the slice views, each measuring >= 5.0 mm. Outputs must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/air_spaces.stl and /home/ga/Documents/air_analysis/pneumocephalus_study.inv3.
